message:
feat(c-api,mvcc,wasm): C API expansion, MVCC core types cell-level additions, WASM adjustments

C API (+160 lines):
- Expand SQLite C compatibility API with additional function bindings
  for broader compatibility with existing C-based SQLite consumers

MVCC core types (+156 lines):
- Continue cell-level MVCC visibility system expansion with additional
  data structures for per-cell version tracking and epoch coordination

WASM:
- Minor WebAssembly compatibility adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
